testcase.name: test_forward_correctness[1-128-128-triton]

failure.message: triton.runtime.errors.OutOfResources: out of resource: shared memory, Required: 106496, Hardware limit: 101376. Reducing block sizes or `num_stages` may help.

testcase.failure:
self = <test_flash_attention.TestFlashAttentionForward object at 0x78ae5b44f710>, device = 'cuda' impl = <function run_flash_attention_triton at 0x78ae7c1451c0>, batch = 1, seq = 128, d = 128
@pytest.mark.parametrize("impl", IMPLEMENTATIONS) @pytest.mark.parametrize( "batch,seq,d", [ (1, 128, 128), # Small (2, 256, 128), # Medium (4, 512, 128), # Larger ], ) def test_forward_correctness(self, device, impl, batch, seq, d): """Test that Flash Attention matches reference implementation.""" Q = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, dtype=torch.float32) K = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, dtype=torch.float32) V = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, dtype=torch.float32)
y_ref = reference_attention(Q, K, V, is_causal=False) > y_flash = impl(Q, K, V, False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_flash_attention.py:82: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tests/test_flash_attention.py:32: in run_flash_attention_triton return skip_on_triton_error(FlashAttentionTriton.apply, Q, K, V, is_causal) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Personal\Working\MVA\LLM\flash-attention-haiphamcse\tests\conftest.py:32: in skip_on_triton_error ??? /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/autograd/function.py:575: in apply return super().apply(*args, **kwargs) # type: ignore[misc] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ flash_attention/flash_attention.py:319: in forward flash_fwd_kernel[grid]( /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:330: in <lambda> return lambda *args, **kwargs: self.run(grid=grid, warmup=False, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:653: in run kernel.run(grid_0, grid_1, grid_2, stream, kernel.function, kernel.packed_metadata, launch_metadata, ^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/compiler/compiler.py:395: in __getattribute__ self._init_handles() _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <triton.compiler.compiler.CompiledKernel object at 0x78ae4fd0e150>
def _init_handles(self): if self.module is not None: return device = driver.active.get_current_device() # create launcher self.run = driver.active.launcher_cls(self.src, self.metadata) # not enough shared memory to run the kernel max_shared = driver.active.utils.get_device_properties(device)["max_shared_mem"] if self.metadata.shared > max_shared: > raise OutOfResources(self.metadata.shared, max_shared, "shared memory") E triton.runtime.errors.OutOfResources: out of resource: shared memory, Required: 106496, Hardware limit: 101376. Reducing block sizes or `num_stages` may help.
/home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/compiler/compiler.py:388: OutOfResources

testcase.name: test_causal_attention[1-128-128-triton]

@pytest.mark.parametrize("impl", IMPLEMENTATIONS) @pytest.mark.parametrize( "batch,seq,d", [ (1, 128, 128), (2, 256, 128), ], ) def test_causal_attention(self, device, impl, batch, seq, d): """Test causal masking in Flash Attention.""" Q = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, dtype=torch.float32) K = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, dtype=torch.float32) V = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, dtype=torch.float32)

testcase.name: test_backward_correctness[2-128-128-triton]

failure.message: triton.runtime.errors.OutOfResources: out of resource: shared memory, Required: 106496, Hardware limit: 101376. Reducing block sizes or `num_stages` may help.

testcase.failure:
self = <test_flash_attention.TestFlashAttentionBackward object at 0x78ae5b44fda0>, device = 'cuda' impl = <function run_flash_attention_triton at 0x78ae7c1451c0>, batch = 2, seq = 128, d = 128
@pytest.mark.parametrize("impl", IMPLEMENTATIONS) @pytest.mark.parametrize( "batch,seq,d", [ (2, 128, 128), (2, 256, 128), ], ) def test_backward_correctness(self, device, impl, batch, seq, d): """Test that backward pass produces correct gradients.""" Q_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True) K_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True) V_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True)
Q_flash = Q_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True) K_flash = K_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True) V_flash = V_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True)
# Forward y_ref = reference_attention(Q_ref, K_ref, V_ref, is_causal=False) > y_flash = impl(Q_flash, K_flash, V_flash, False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_flash_attention.py:141: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tests/test_flash_attention.py:32: in run_flash_attention_triton return skip_on_triton_error(FlashAttentionTriton.apply, Q, K, V, is_causal) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Personal\Working\MVA\LLM\flash-attention-haiphamcse\tests\conftest.py:32: in skip_on_triton_error ??? /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/autograd/function.py:575: in apply return super().apply(*args, **kwargs) # type: ignore[misc] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ flash_attention/flash_attention.py:319: in forward flash_fwd_kernel[grid]( /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:330: in <lambda> return lambda *args, **kwargs: self.run(grid=grid, warmup=False, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:653: in run kernel.run(grid_0, grid_1, grid_2, stream, kernel.function, kernel.packed_metadata, launch_metadata, ^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/compiler/compiler.py:395: in __getattribute__ self._init_handles() _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <triton.compiler.compiler.CompiledKernel object at 0x78ae4fd0e150>

testcase.name: test_backward_correctness[2-256-128-triton]

failure.message: triton.runtime.errors.OutOfResources: out of resource: shared memory, Required: 106496, Hardware limit: 101376. Reducing block sizes or `num_stages` may help.

testcase.failure:
self = <test_flash_attention.TestFlashAttentionBackward object at 0x78ae5b44fe90>, device = 'cuda' impl = <function run_flash_attention_triton at 0x78ae7c1451c0>, batch = 2, seq = 256, d = 128
@pytest.mark.parametrize("impl", IMPLEMENTATIONS) @pytest.mark.parametrize( "batch,seq,d", [ (2, 128, 128), (2, 256, 128), ], ) def test_backward_correctness(self, device, impl, batch, seq, d): """Test that backward pass produces correct gradients.""" Q_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True) K_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True) V_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True)
Q_flash = Q_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True) K_flash = K_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True) V_flash = V_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True)
# Forward y_ref = reference_attention(Q_ref, K_ref, V_ref, is_causal=False) > y_flash = impl(Q_flash, K_flash, V_flash, False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_flash_attention.py:141: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tests/test_flash_attention.py:32: in run_flash_attention_triton return skip_on_triton_error(FlashAttentionTriton.apply, Q, K, V, is_causal) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Personal\Working\MVA\LLM\flash-attention-haiphamcse\tests\conftest.py:32: in skip_on_triton_error ??? /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/autograd/function.py:575: in apply return super().apply(*args, **kwargs) # type: ignore[misc] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ flash_attention/flash_attention.py:319: in forward flash_fwd_kernel[grid]( /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:330: in <lambda> return lambda *args, **kwargs: self.run(grid=grid, warmup=False, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:653: in run kernel.run(grid_0, grid_1, grid_2, stream, kernel.function, kernel.packed_metadata, launch_metadata, ^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/compiler/compiler.py:395: in __getattribute__ self._init_handles() _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <triton.compiler.compiler.CompiledKernel object at 0x78ae4fd0e150>
def _init_handles(self): if self.module is not None: return device = driver.active.get_current_device() # create launcher self.run = driver.active.launcher_cls(self.src, self.metadata) # not enough shared memory to run the kernel max_shared = driver.active.utils.get_device_properties(device)["max_shared_mem"] if self.metadata.shared > max_shared: > raise OutOfResources(self.metadata.shared, max_shared, "shared memory") E triton.runtime.errors.OutOfResources: out of resource: shared memory, Required: 106496, Hardware limit: 101376. Reducing block sizes or `num_stages` may help.
/home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/compiler/compiler.py:388: OutOfResources

testcase.name: test_backward_causal[triton]

failure.message: triton.runtime.errors.OutOfResources: out of resource: shared memory, Required: 106496, Hardware limit: 101376. Reducing block sizes or `num_stages` may help.

testcase.failure:
self = <test_flash_attention.TestFlashAttentionBackward object at 0x78ae5b478f80>, device = 'cuda' impl = <function run_flash_attention_triton at 0x78ae7c1451c0>
@pytest.mark.parametrize("impl", IMPLEMENTATIONS) def test_backward_causal(self, device, impl): """Test backward pass with causal masking.""" batch, seq, d = 2, 128, 128
Q_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True) K_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True) V_ref = torch.randn(batch, seq, d, device=device, requires_grad=True)
Q_flash = Q_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True) K_flash = K_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True) V_flash = V_ref.detach().clone().requires_grad_(True)
# Forward with causal y_ref = reference_attention(Q_ref, K_ref, V_ref, is_causal=True) > y_flash = impl(Q_flash, K_flash, V_flash, True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_flash_attention.py:167: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tests/test_flash_attention.py:32: in run_flash_attention_triton return skip_on_triton_error(FlashAttentionTriton.apply, Q, K, V, is_causal) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Personal\Working\MVA\LLM\flash-attention-haiphamcse\tests\conftest.py:32: in skip_on_triton_error ??? /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/autograd/function.py:575: in apply return super().apply(*args, **kwargs) # type: ignore[misc] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ flash_attention/flash_attention.py:319: in forward flash_fwd_kernel[grid]( /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:330: in <lambda> return lambda *args, **kwargs: self.run(grid=grid, warmup=False, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/runtime/jit.py:653: in run kernel.run(grid_0, grid_1, grid_2, stream, kernel.function, kernel.packed_metadata, launch_metadata, ^^^^^^^^^^ /home/haipham/anaconda3/envs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/triton/compiler/compiler.py:395: in __getattribute__ self._init_handles() _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <triton.compiler.compiler.CompiledKernel object at 0x78ae4fc54c50>
def _init_handles(self): if self.module is not None: return device = driver.active.get_current_device() # create launcher self.run = driver.active.launcher_cls(self.src, self.metadata) # not enough shared memory to run the kernel max_shared = driver.active.utils.get_device_properties(device)["max_shared_mem"] if self.metadata.shared > max_shared: > raise OutOfResources(self.metadata.shared, max_shared, "shared memory") E triton.runtime.errors.OutOfResources: out of resource: shared memory, Required: 106496, Hardware limit: 101376. Reducing block sizes or `num_stages` may help.
